title: Travel & Accommodation
content: Travel & Accommodation How to reach JUIT Waknaghat and where to stay during the conference. How to Reach JUIT By Air Convenient airports are: Shimla (30 Km) Chandigarh (100 Km) New Delhi (350 Km) Amritsar (350 Km) By Train Direct trains from Delhi and other places are available upto Kalka (70 Km) . From Kalka, you can hire a taxi or board a bus to Waknaghat. You can also take the Kalka-Shimla Heritage Toy Train upto Kandaghat (12 Km from JUIT). By Bus All buses from Delhi, Chandigarh (ISBT, Sec 43), and other places to Shimla drop and pick up passengers at Waknaghat . Online Bus Reservation: Himachal Road Transport Haryana Road Transport General Information The University is situated in the neighbourhood of Shimla, 3 KM off the NH22 (Ambala-Kalka-Waknaghat-Shimla road). It is just a half-hour drive to Shimla from campus. Tourist Attractions Shimla (24 Km) Chail (45 Km) Kufri (45 Km) Kasauli (50 Km) Need Assistance?
